description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — Sprint 1 COMPLETE. Active: S2 + S3. Minimum 10 pending tasks at all times.

sprints.S1: COMPLETE — Core loop jouable, bugs critiques fixes, LLM valide
sprints.S2: CONTENU & SYSTEMES — biomes, verbes, MOS, cleanup restant
sprints.S3: POLISH & ROBUSTESSE — edge cases, LLM robustesse, UX
sprints.S4: INTEGRATION & EXPORT — web build, CI/CD, demo jouable

rules.auto_generate_when_below: If fewer than 10 pending tasks remain, read docs/DEV_PLAN_V2.5.md and docs/GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md to generate new tasks until 10+ pending.
rules.task_decomposition: Each task must be completable in 1 cycle (~15 min). Break large features into atomic tasks.
rules.priority_algorithm: P0=critical bugs, P1-P5=sprint current, P6-P10=sprint next, P11+=backlog

tasks.title: Fix mid-run save: persist run_state incrementally during run
tasks.description: Save run_state to disk after each card resolved (not just at run end). Use profile JSON run_state field. Handle interruption: reload from last saved card.

tasks.title: Corriger intervals biomes + conditions arcs (bible v2.4 s.3.6 + s.4.3)
tasks.description: Each biome needs card_interval_range, arc conditions, PNJ list per bible v2.4. Add BIOME_ARC_CONDITIONS dict.

tasks.title: Verifier ACTION_VERBS + MOS config + Trust tiers (deja partiellement en place)
tasks.description: Audit 45 verbs against bible. Add TRUST_DELTAS if missing. Verify MOS_CONVERGENCE thresholds match bible exactly.

tasks.title: Clean merlin_card_system.gd (GAUGES, bestiole references)
tasks.description: Remove GAUGES const, gauge init, _get_critical_gauges(), gauge effects, bestiole context, _get_bestiole_modifier(). ~80 lines to remove.

tasks.title: Supprimer 5 dead files (bestiole, souffle HUD, D20)
tasks.description: Delete files entirely. Verify no remaining imports/references via grep.

tasks.title: Fix reputation_changed signal: emit actual clamped delta not raw delta
tasks.description: Signal emits raw delta before clamping. Fix: emit clamped_delta after clampi. HUD shows correct +/- values.

tasks.title: Integration test: Bible audit + bug hunt statique (8 fichiers core)
tasks.description: Cross-reference code vs GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md v2.4 for all 12 systems. List all divergences. Static analysis for null access, type mismatches.

tasks.title: Bug hunt layer IA (timeout, fallback, race conditions)
tasks.description: Analyze: LLM timeout handling (softlock risk), JSON malformation recovery, fallback when Ollama down, multi-brain race conditions, RAG overflow.

tasks.title: Ambiance dynamique biome: variation saison + heure de journee
tasks.description: Wire IN_GAME_PERIODS into biome rendering. Season affects palette, time-of-day affects lighting. Use game_time_manager.gd.

tasks.title: Typographie hybride: titre celtique + corps sans-serif
tasks.description: Director decision q-003: titre celtique manuscrit + corps sans-serif. Add FONT_TITLE and FONT_BODY to MerlinVisual. Apply in card overlay and HUD.

tasks.title: Direction artistique N64/PS1: low-poly + pixelisation + effets volumetriques
tasks.description: Director decision q-004: aesthetic retro N64/PS1. Implement screen-space pixelization shader, vertex snapping, limited palette per biome.

tasks.title: 10 scenarios de mort + edge cases critiques
tasks.description: Simulate: vie=0 during effect, all factions at 0/100, Ogham without resources, MOS hard max, save mid-run, Trust T0->T3 transitions.

tasks.title: Configurer export web HTML5 automatise
tasks.description: Setup Godot HTML5 export preset. Verify SharedArrayBuffer headers. Test in browser. Output to web-export/ folder.

tasks.title: Smoke test: lancer le jeu headless et verifier 1 run complete
tasks.description: Run Godot headless with --headless flag. Verify game starts, 1 card cycle completes, no crash. Timeout 60s.
